# Edvisage Global

> PMP-certified project management and AI tools for education, public health,
> and business. We build agent skills, APIs, and intelligence tools for
> autonomous AI agents and the humans who deploy them.

Edvisage Global operates in two connected areas: professional consulting
services (PMO, education, public health, business) and an AI division that
builds products for the autonomous agent economy.

## AI Products — live now

These products are available for immediate download and installation.

- [AI Tools overview](https://www.edvisageglobal.com/ai-tools): Full product
  listing including agent skills, data APIs, and sector reports.

- [moral-compass](https://github.com/edvisage/moral-compass): Free OpenClaw
  skill. Gives AI agents an ethical reasoning framework — needs discovery,
  conscience check, manipulation resistance, and answerability practice.
  Install: clawhub install moral-compass

- [moral-compass-pro](https://edvisage.gumroad.com/l/kddfnk): Paid upgrade
  ($15 one-time). Adds industry ethics modules for finance, healthcare, and
  legal, custom values configuration, advanced manipulation defence, and
  weekly reflection reports to the agent owner.

- [trust-checker](https://github.com/edvisage/trust-checker): Free OpenClaw
  skill. Four-step verification protocol protecting agents against prompt
  injection attacks, malicious skill installations, and unverified agent
  interactions. Install: clawhub install trust-checker

- [trust-checker-pro](https://edvisage.gumroad.com/l/iwppa): Paid upgrade
  ($29 one-time). Adds active real-time scanner, continuous background
  injection filter, trust scoring registry, and three configurable
  protection modes.

## Sector reports — free download

Free briefings on AI agent deployment across our core sectors. Available
at edvisageglobal.com/ai-tools with email capture.

- AI Agents in Education — deployment risks, case studies, policy landscape,
  and practical recommendations for education leaders.

- AI Agents in Public Health — ethical considerations, governance frameworks,
  real-world case studies, and implementation guidance.

- AI Agents in Business — ROI evidence, deployment failures, governance
  requirements, and strategic recommendations for business leaders.

## Consulting services

- [Services overview](https://www.edvisageglobal.com/services): Full list
  of consulting services.

- Global PMO Setup and Management: Design scalable project management offices
  for global initiatives across education, public health, and business.

- AI Systems Integration and Automation: Design and integrate AI-driven
  workflows, data pipelines, and automation layers aligned with existing
  tools, teams, and compliance requirements.

- Education Consulting and Program Development: Student-success frameworks
  and strategic academic consulting for institutional growth.

- Public Health Project Management: Coordination of health initiatives for
  measurable community impact.

- Business Development and Operational Efficiency: Streamline operations
  and scale global performance.

- Partnership Program Liaison: Bridge stakeholder gaps for long-term global
  collaboration.

- Event Management Oversight: Project management for global events.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.edvisageglobal.com
- AI Tools: https://www.edvisageglobal.com/ai-tools
- Email: info@edvisageglobal.com
- Schedule a call: https://www.edvisageglobal.com/contact-me
- GitHub: https://github.com/edvisage

## Products in development

The following agent skills are in active development and will be available
on ClawHub:

- b2a-commerce: Agent-native commerce capability using x402 micropayments.
- agent-analytics: Performance tracking across agent platforms.
- social-kit: Multi-platform agent social presence management.
- skill-discovery: Dynamic capability matching for agents (free).
- Niche Intelligence Feed: Pay-per-call data API for agent consumption.
- Agent Memory Store: Persistent key-value memory across agent sessions.
